summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Grupo Novega landing page MVP. All backend APIs pass. All frontend sections load correctly with dark luxury theme. Language toggle, contact form, navigation, mobile hamburger menu, service cards, property cards, job board, footer socials all working.

issues: Hero title text renders as 'PATRIMONIO QUEINSPIRA FUTURO' (missing space between lines when read as text_content) - visual rendering is correct with two lines, not a real bug

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is clean and simple - no issues
MongoDB _id correctly excluded with projection {'_id': 0} in GET /api/contact
No authentication on GET /api/contact - exposes all user contact messages. Consider adding admin auth for production
test_credentials: No auth required - public landing page
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed contact messages via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend: 5/5 tests pass. Frontend: Hero, About, Services (3 cards), Properties (3 cards), JobBoard, Contact form (posts to /api/contact with success toast), Footer (4 social links), Language toggle (ES/EN), Mobile hamburger menu - all verified working.
